title: 有馬記念の後に・Still with You

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I lost.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhhh!
Go, Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The eyes of every spectator in the venue are on
Fine. I can't help but feel a resounding defeat...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, would you run with me a little more? I don't
like to wallow in these things.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Grk.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, I couldn't pull it off. It looks like you'll be
taking the victory and going home.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll... I'll definitely come and visit you. ...So race
me again when I do!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course! ...Someday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's wonderful. I've finally reached it—this
wonderful view.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? You're thanking me for losing?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Shakur! You big silly!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Haaah?! The hell did you just sa—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You came to win and you did your best. In the
end, you lost.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You were never running for my sake. And I don't
care for any insinuation that you were!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
Pretty lame, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I knew from the start how this would play out. I
knew I'd lose and that would be the end of the
road for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But where's the fun in that? So I kept searching
for something that could distort the result.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And that's when I found you, Fine. You were
different. At first, all I cared about was getting
some unique data and analyzing it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But then, one day... you defied my predictions. In
that moment, a thought crossed my mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: If anyone can change their fate, it's her.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought if I could get you to keep running—to
defy your destiny—then that would prove that my
fate could change as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So I put my faith in a dumb hypothesis and clung to it... like an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And this is where it's got me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even so... even with this result... This isn't grounds
for you to give up, is it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Come on now. Even in that split-second when I
beat you, I could see every one of your neurons
firing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When I spoke to you, I got a glimpse of that face
of yours that I love so much.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Facing up to your discontent and running with the
hope of never being forgotten... I know what it's
like.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that the more you open up about your
feelings, like just now... the more they'll resonate
with the hearts of others.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I did what I needed to for my sake. What about
you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
How about you quit your yapping and take a
hike?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Farewell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we have a press conference to
announce Fine Motion's return to Ireland.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm all right.
...Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm very fortunate, aren't I? I'm a truly, truly
blessed individual.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I got to run so much, and I made so many friends.
I heard the glorious sound of countless cheers.
choice_data_list:
No one's going to forget the impact you've
made.

No one's going to forget the impact you've
made.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right. I'm sure they'll all remember me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And I believe it'll be a dazzling memory.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Fine!
Don't quit! Keep racing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all so much. However, I must bring
these wonderful three years to a close.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This exquisite ending has been decided from the
very start.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Every race has a beginning and an end. But in our
memories, it becomes more than a simple
contest...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As long as you none of you forget me, I'll live on
in your memories.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So please, allow me to stay... within your hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's eyes glisten in rare fashion as she
smiles on at the crowd.
